characters.appearance: Stylized 2D animated brown bear. It has a round body, small ears, and simple facial features with black eyes and a black nose.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue scarf or towel draped around its neck.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं Supernova के साथ रोज़ English बोलना सीख रहा हूँ। [I am learning to speak English daily with Supernova.]
Character A says: I love the beach! [I love the beach!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by stating the app's core value proposition directly in a relatable Hindi-English mix.
- Demonstrates immediate success by having the character confidently speak the target language (English).
- Establishes a cheerful, practical, and encouraging tone while removing the competitor's 'free' claim.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
मैं Supernova के साथ रोज़ English बोलना सीख रहा हूँ।
I love the beach!
